case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX VS. LUKAS WITT

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 165.99 SERVED JUL-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WITT, LUKAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOANN ADAMS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LUKAS WITT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WITT, LUKAS $1,811.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,976.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
